text: As I stand before the glass doors, the geometry and cool repetition of reflections give me a sense of anticipation—something awaits beyond, perhaps a threshold between the familiar and the unknown. Stepping into the second scene, I am surrounded by the bold declaration of R+D and the sparkling colors of innovation. Screens hum with the labor of thought, and I feel energized, as if intellect itself hangs in the air. Here, there is purpose, experimentation, and the possibility of discovery. I feel both curious and inspired, eager to participate in whatever ideas are cultivated here.
